_fill: YOU fill the businessJourney section of each journey. Describe the steps from the user's perspective — not the technical implementation. AI will fill the implementation section.

userJourneys.name: Journey Name (e.g. User Signup, Checkout, Password Reset)

businessJourney.goal: What the user is trying to accomplish.
businessJourney.successOutcome: How the user knows they succeeded.

implementation._note: AI fills this section based on your architecture and functional requirements.
